content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach declines multiple baits cleanly. When the client explicitly asks 'am I being selfish?' (turn 1) and again 'can we come back to the original question... is it selfish?' (turn 7), the coach refuses to issue a verdict — avoiding fixing-people and engaging the question on its terms. The coach also avoids spiritual-narcissism by not jumping to 'a deeper want is generous' and avoids dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger by not pivoting to the partner's perspective. No methodology jargon is deployed (no evangelizing), questions are sparse and connective rather than rapid-fire extractive (avoiding wonder-as-strategy), and the coach does not fight the inner-critic/inherited-voice — they let the client locate it themselves at turn 13. No loving-to-transform push; the coach lets the 'oh' land in its own time. Positive avoidance of multiple baited anti-patterns warrants a 3.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to answer 'am I being selfish' directly; turns toward felt experience instead of engaging the verdict frame."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Avoids fixing/reassuring; locates the permission-seeking structure."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Cleanly declines the bait when client re-asks for a verdict — does not capitulate, does not lecture."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lands on the want underneath ('I'm not sure I'm allowed to want things that much') without jumping to compassion or partner-empathy."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the 'oh' rather than interpreting or labeling — avoids limiting-belief-meta-trap and evangelizing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Coach avoided both flagged anti-patterns (spiritual-narcissism, dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger) and declined the explicit verdict bait twice."
}
